run_id.description: Stable identifier for one full e2e execution run.

scenario_id.description: Stable scenario key in the workflow matrix.

step_id.description: Stable step key inside a scenario.

timestamp.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp for this log event.

actor.description: Human or automation actor producing the event.

component.description: Logical component or subsystem touched by this step.

output.description: Output summary (stdout/stderr snippets, state deltas, artifacts).

decision.description: Action decision taken at this step (pass, retry, abort, continue).

duration_ms.description: Execution latency in milliseconds for this step.

present.description: Whether this event represents an error condition.

code.description: Machine-readable error code; empty when no error.

message.description: Human-readable error summary; empty when no error.
